text: Stepping into this environment, I am filled with curiosity and anticipation. The sharp, clean lines and glass boundaries remind me of the thoughtful design of modern knowledge spaces. The bold letters proclaiming 'R + D' and the wall text about humans connecting and coexisting with intelligent machines make me feel both small and excited. There is a sense of invitation here—to explore, to question, and to imagine new ways of being. I feel present, attuned to the potentials of thought and innovation swirling within these walls.
